category_sources: source_facts.description: Sub-divide a PDF page(s) into smaller pages so you can print them.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository; README is the best official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/oxplot/pdftilecut; repository lookup skipped per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description describes subdividing PDF pages for printing; source_facts.executables lists pdftilecut CLI.
